title: Platform spec: assembly pipeline, DI hub, and macros

source.subject: docs(platform-spec): assembly pipeline, DI hub, macros, and submodule bumps

body:
## Outcome

Assembly pipeline, DI hub, macros, and submodule bumps.

## Context

- Workstream **platform-spec** — normative spec on beskid-lang.org.
- Macro work follows platform-spec **language-meta/macros** semantics (registry, expand pass, resolver re-resolve).
- Normative updates live under `site/website/src/content/docs/platform-spec/` and ship via beskid-lang.org.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`60fc81e`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/60fc81e) — docs(platform-spec): assembly pipeline, DI hub, macros, and submodule bumps
